candidate_definition_hints.text: Automatically detect when a worker is on a phone using power of computer vision

Idle control is one of the Official [5sControl](https://5scontrol.com/) algorithm. Plug it in our video monitoring system with AI analysis and ERP Integration (Open Source) to uncover employee inefficiencies and minimize downtime.
